name: Ceramic Accent Table Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Glazed No Assembly Round Furniture, 200lb Capacity
description:
Add chic flair and functionality to your space with the Ceramic Accent Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Standing at a height of 18 inches, this ceramic table features a glossy brown finish and a round tabletop perched atop a flared pedestal base. Use this stunning accent piece to display decorative items or as a stylish side table to place your belongings.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
